title: The Flyer - San Francisco Photos - Yelp
content: Frank was extremely helpful and made my family feel welcomed at the Flyer. I can't say enough about this man. Kids loved him for sure. The escape room was fun.

title: The Flyer Thrill Zone - All You SHOULD Know Before Going 2026 ...
content: This was just as good as Disney's version. You fly over San Francisco and get to see all of the city. We also did their TRex ride since it was only half price.

title: The Flyer Thrill Zone - All You SHOULD Know Before Going (2026 ...
content: I actually enjoyed this visual ride. Your legs are dangling during the ride and nothing to hold onto, but the views of California are from a birds eye point of

title: Take Flight on PIER 39! Ride The Flyer Flying Theater Today!
content: The Flyer San Francisco Logo The Flyer San Francisco Logo. # Take Flight on PIER 39! The Flyer is Northern California’s only Flying Theater, offering a thrilling and immersive experience that will leave you breathless. Come ride The Flyer and be amazed as you take flight on PIER 39! ## Fly high with The Flyer – A Flying Theater Experience. The newest addition to The Flyer Thrill Zone, T-Rex Safari immerses you into the prehistoric world, with massive dinosaurs and heart-pumping interactive moments! Riders must be 40″ high to ride The Flyer and the 7D Theater. ### Find us on PIER 39 and Take Flight! Contact our Event Planning Team to learn how The Flyer Thrill Zone is the MOST fun in San Francisco. The Flyer and 7D experience are not only the perfect spot for kid birthday parties, but also all the way up to a full venue rental for your next company event!
